tools.Name: LightRAG
tools.Description: A retrieval-augmented generation framework that utilizes graph structures and multimodal processing to improve information retrieval accuracy and speed.
tools.Use_Case: Automating complex RAG tasks with document parsing and graph-based retrieval.

tools.Name: TradingAgents
tools.Description: A multi-agent framework designed for financial trading, using specialized LLM agents for market analysis, risk management, and decision-making.
tools.Use_Case: Simulated financial market analysis and automated trading strategy research.

tools.Name: Open Sandbox
tools.Description: A platform providing secure, isolated runtime environments (Docker/Kubernetes) specifically for AI applications like coding agents and code execution.
tools.Use_Case: Executing untrusted code generated by AI agents within a secure, sandboxed container environment.
